About FashionHub

Our Story

A house built on quality, trend and elegance — one collection at a time.

Where It Began

Born From A Simple Passion

FashionHub started with a passion for fashion and a desire to help people express themselves through style. What began as a small idea grew into a house that women trust for the moments that matter — the interviews, the weddings, the everyday mornings that deserve a little more confidence.

We believe clothing is never just fabric. It's the quiet confidence you carry into a room, the story you tell before you've said a word. That belief is the thread running through everything we curate.

How We Choose

Every Collection, Chosen With Care

Every collection we offer is selected carefully, keeping quality, trends and elegance in mind. We work closely with artisans and designers who share our obsession with detail — the fall of a drape, the weight of an embroidery, the way a silhouette moves.

Nothing reaches our shelves without first passing a simple test: would we wear it ourselves, and would we still love it five years from now?

Quality First Trend Aware Timeless Elegance
Our Promise

What FashionHub Stands For

✦

Uncompromising Quality

Every fabric, stitch and finish is chosen to last — not just to trend.

◆

Personal Expression

Style should feel like you. We curate pieces that let your personality lead.

✧

Honest Elegance

Luxury without pretence — beauty that feels approachable, not distant.

Curated For You

Our Collections

Four capsules, one philosophy — dress for the moment, without ever losing yourself.

01

Everyday Edit

Modern outfits designed for everyday elegance and confidence. Soft silhouettes and rich embroidery detail that move effortlessly from morning meetings to evening plans.

Enquire Now →
02

Timeless Luxe

Luxury fashion inspired by timeless beauty and sophistication. Draped in fine fabric with hand-set pearls, built for the moments you'll remember.

Enquire Now →
03

Casual Muse

Comfortable casual styles with modern trends and premium quality. Clean lines, breathable fabrics, and details that keep it interesting.

Enquire Now →
04

Celebration Couture

Exclusive designer collection for special occasions and celebrations. Statement pieces, hand-finished detailing, made to be the moment.

Enquire Now →
What We Offer

Our Services

From first consultation to final fitting — we're with you at every step of your style journey.

👗

Personal Styling

One-on-one sessions to build a wardrobe that reflects your personality, body and lifestyle — not just a trend cycle.

💎

Fashion Consultation

Expert guidance on colour, silhouette and occasion dressing, from everyday looks to milestone events.

✦

Premium Collections

Access to hand-picked, quality-checked pieces across everyday, luxury, casual and celebration wear.

📈

Trend Recommendations

Stay ahead with curated recommendations that adapt classic elegance to what's current.

🤝

Customer Support

Responsive, real support before and after your purchase — because the relationship doesn't end at checkout.

🧭

Fashion Guidance

Not sure where to start? We'll help you define a style direction you'll still love in five years.

How It Works

Your Styling Journey

01

Share Your Story

Tell us about the occasion, your style and what you're hoping to feel in what you wear.

02

Get Curated Picks

Our stylists shortlist pieces from our collections tailored to you.

03

Fit & Refine

We fine-tune fit, colour and detailing until it feels exactly right.

04

Step Out In Style

Wear it with confidence — and reach out anytime for your next look.

The Face Behind FashionHub

Our Founder

Life is all about slaying.

"Life is all about slaying."
Founder & Creative Director

Sanjivanee Murke

Name Sanjivanee Murke
Based In Nagpur, Maharashtra, India
Tagline "Life is all about slaying."

How It Started

FashionHub began the way most meaningful things do — quietly, with a single spark of passion. Sanjivanee grew up fascinated by fabric, colour and the quiet power of a well-chosen outfit. What started as styling friends and family for weddings and celebrations soon became something bigger: a genuine calling to help people feel unstoppable in what they wear.

A Passion For Fashion

For Sanjivanee, fashion was never about following the crowd. It was about noticing the woman in front of the mirror and asking: what does she want the world to see? That question became the foundation of FashionHub — a house built not around trends, but around people.

Inspiration

Her inspiration comes from the women around her — mothers who dressed with quiet strength, friends who wore confidence like a second skin, and a city, Nagpur, rich with colour, culture and craftsmanship. Every collection carries a little of that inspiration forward.

Mission

To make premium, thoughtfully-curated fashion accessible to every woman who wants to feel her most confident self — without compromising on quality, elegance or individuality.

Vision

To build FashionHub into a name synonymous with timeless Indian elegance — a brand women turn to not just for clothes, but for the feeling of walking into a room and owning it.

Looking Ahead

The road ahead is exciting: more curated collections, a wider styling community, and a FashionHub that reaches women far beyond Nagpur — all while staying true to the personal, hands-on care this brand was built on. This is only the beginning.

"Every woman deserves to feel like the best version of herself."

— Sanjivanee Murke, Founder of FashionHub
